# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ApiSpecification Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-apispecification.html): Defines the core interface, data structures, and endpoint contracts using standard OpenAPI formatting. Architectural overview of the ApiSpecification domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [DeveloperExperience Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-developerexperience.html): Handles the conceptual guides, onboarding workflows, and technical narratives for external developers. Architectural overview of the DeveloperExperience domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [SiteInfrastructure Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-siteinfrastructure.html): Manages the visual presentation and organizational metadata for the documentation site. Architectural overview of the SiteInfrastructure domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
